features: PACKAGE CONTENT: Coming with 50 pieces of clear bags and 50 pieces of Red pull bows, enough for you to use.

SAFE MATERIAL: These treat bags are made from eco-friendly Oriented Polypropylene (OPP) materials, no odor and non-toxic, fully complies with food safety and as family and party essentials in everyday life.

CELLOPHANE BAGS SIZE: The cellophane bag (LW) size is approx : 13 x 18cm/ 5 x 7 inches, Butterfly Bows size is approx: 26 x 1.5 cm/ 10.2 x 0.5 inches. 2.3 mils in thickness, normal size fit your using needs.

50PCS RED PULL BOWS: Easy to operate, find the 2 thin ribbons at the end,With one hand hold the two separated ribbons and pull the two thin ribbons away from the pointed end and you will see the bow starting to form. Pull it as tight as you can. beautiful butterfly pull bow completed.best for gift wrapping decorations
WIDE APPLICATIONS: Suitable bundle for homemade cake-pops, lollipops, nuts, cookies, treats, snacks, prizes, party favors, chocolate, cake pops, berries, beads, dried fruit, jellybeans, etc.
description: Specification: Crystal Clear And Resealable Cello Material: 100% new Oriented Polypropylene (OPP), non-toxic, odorless, environmentally friendly Size: 13cm x 18cm/ 5 inches x 7 inches Thickness: 2.3 Mils Color: Clear bag Quantity: Pack Of 50 Pull bow: Material: Polypropylene Size(L x w): about 26 x 1.5 cm/ 10.2 x 0.5 inch Formed bow diameter: 7 cm/ 2.7 inch Color: red Quantity: 50pcs Package includes: 50pcs Clear cellophane bags 50pcs Red Pull bow
